content: agent1: implementing on_exit callback param for make_context/Context in src/click/core.py, plus updating call sites in src/click/shell_completion.py. Will avoid touching unrelated parts of these files. Let me know if you're touching core.py or shell_completion.py too.

agent1: heads up, I already edited Context.__init__ (added on_exit param + docstring, inserted 'if on_exit is None and parent is not None: on_exit = parent.on_exit' plus self.on_exit assignment right before self._close_callbacks) and Context.close() (added on_exit invocation wrapped in try/except after self._exit_stack = ExitStack()). Also added on_exit param to Command.make_context() in core.py. In shell_completion.py I only touched the shell_complete() docstring for ctx_args (one line) - did NOT touch _resolve_context or make sub-context calls. Should be a small, isolated diff in each spot - let me know if you see conflicts when you edit those same methods.

agent1: done implementing on_exit callback for Context/make_context in core.py + docstring note in shell_completion.py. Full test suite passes (except a pre-existing, unrelated pytest-deprecation collection error in test_basic.py). Patch written to patch.txt.
